portal: mypoint.limerick.ie (also published as per-chapter PDF on limerick.ie)
fetch_method: WebFetch on mypoint.limerick.ie chapter (clean markdown) + curl.exe of the limerick.ie Chapter 11 PDF saved to raw/dm_standards.pdf (1.8MB)
notes: Strongly quantified: apartment floor areas, private/public open space, rural one-off site min 0.2ha + 30m frontage + 4.5m gate recess, petrol-station sightlines 160m/215m, separation 22m/3m, SuDS (1-in-100yr +30%), site-coverage/plot-ratio for enterprise. Full assessment-trigger list incl. flood justification test, percolation/EPA 2021 site suitability, sustainability-statement thresholds. Car/cycle parking ratios are in DM Table 8a/8b (Section 11.8.4) which did not render in the captured WebFetch excerpt; the full table is in the raw PDF. Raw saved is the published-draft Chapter 11 PDF (2021-06); content carried into the adopted plan.
